popularStory.headline:
John Warren III
(1 August 1585 – 13 December 1667)
popularStory.description:
Baptized Nayland 1 August 1585, son of John and Elizabeth (Scarlett) Warren. 

Migrated from Nayland, Suffolk to Massachusetts Bay in 1630 & settled in Watertown. Died in Watertown, 13 December 1667, …

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Warren III於1585年8月1日出生在英國艾可哈爾維其時，他的父親John Warren11582歲，母親Elizabeth Scarlett23歲。他和Margaret Abbott至少有5個兒子和9個女兒。他於1631年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托。他去世於1667年12月13日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可李特頓享年82歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Warren III于1585年8月1日出生在英国艾可哈爾維其时，他的父亲John Warren11582岁，母亲Elizabeth Scarlett23岁。他和Margaret Abbott至少有5个儿子和9个女儿。他于1631年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托。他去世于1667年12月13日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可李特頓享年82岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托。

nameMeanings.name: Warren
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English (Old French) personal name Warin, Werin, a borrowing of ancient Germanic Warino, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’. Compare Waring .

English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from La Varrenne in Seine-Maritime, France, named with a Gaulish element probably descriptive of alluvial land or sandy soil. This was the name of a major Norman family after the Conquest. In Ireland, this name has been Gaelicized as Bharain.
Irish: adopted as an English form of Gaelic Ó Murnáin (see Murnane , Warner ).

variants.name: Warrens
meanings: English: variant of Warren with genitival or excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Warrener
meanings: English (of Norman origin): occupational name from Old French warrennier ‘warrener’, an officer employed to watch over game in a park or game preserve. Compare Warren .

variants.name: Murnane
meanings: Irish (Munster): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Murnáin, a shortened and dissimilated form of Ó Manannáin ‘descendant of Manannán’, name borne in Celtic mythology by a sea god associated with the Isle of Man. All three syllables appear in the variant Marrinan. This name has also been Anglicized as Warren and Warner .

variants.name: Warne
meanings: occasionally a habitational name from Wearne in Somerset. The place takes its name from a lost stream-name based on British verno- ‘alder, swamp’.

variants.name: Waring
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of Warren , from the Norman personal name Warin, derived from ancient Germanic Warino, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’. The name was popular in France and among the Normans (see Guerin ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When John Warren III was born on 1 August 1585, in Harwich, Essex, England, his father, John Warren, was 11582 and his mother, Elizabeth Scarlett, was 23. He had at least 5 sons and 9 daughters with Margaret Abbott. He lived in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1631. He died on 13 December 1667, in Littleton, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 82, and was buried in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Warren III est né le 1 août 1585, à Harwich, Essex, Angleterre, son père, John Warren, avait 11582 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Scarlett, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 9 filles avec Margaret Abbott. Il a vécu à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1631. Il est décédé le 13 décembre 1667, à Littleton, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterré à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Warren III am 1. August 1585 in Harwich, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Warren 11582 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Scarlett 23. Er hatte mit Margaret Abbott mindestens 5 Söhne und 9 Töchter. 1631 hat er in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America gelebt. Er starb am 13. Dezember 1667 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Littleton, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Warren III è nato il il 1 agosto 1585 nel Harwich, Essex, England, il suo padre, John Warren, aveva 11582 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Scarlett, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 9 figlie con Margaret Abbott. Vissuto a Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1631. Morì il 13 dicembre 1667, nel Littleton, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 82 anni, e fu sepolto a Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: John Warren IIIが1585年8月1日にイギリスエセックスハーウィチで生まれた時，父John Warrenは11582歳，母Elizabeth Scarlettは23歳であった。彼はMargaret Abbottとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と9人の娘をもうけた。彼は1631年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンに住んでいた。彼は1667年12月13日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスリットレトンで82歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Warren III(이)가 1585년 8월 1일 영국 에세스 하위치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Warren(은)는 11582세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Scarlett(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Margaret Abbott(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 1631년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 살았다. 그는 1667년 12월 13일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 리틀레턴에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Warren III nasceu em 1 de agosto de 1585, em Harwich, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Warren, tinha 11582 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Scarlett, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 9 filhas com Margaret Abbott. Ele viveu em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1631. Ele faleceu em 13 de dezembro de 1667, em Littleton, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 82 anos, e foi sepultado em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Warren III родился 1 августа 1585 г. в местности харвич, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John Warren было 11582 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Scarlett, 23. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 9 дочерей от Margaret Abbott. Он жил в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1631 году. Он умер 13 декабря 1667 г. в местности литлетон, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 82 лет и был похоронен в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Warren III nació el 1 de agosto de 1585, en Harwich, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, John Warren, tenía 11582 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Scarlett, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 9 hijas con Margaret Abbott. Vivió en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1631. Murió el 13 de diciembre de 1667, en Littleton, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultado en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
